title: Paymentology CTO Says Meta Program Shows Limits of Stablecoin Payouts
message_html: Paymentology CTO Says Meta Program Shows Limits of Stablecoin Payouts ...
snippet: Meta announced in March it would begin offering stablecoin payouts to Colombian and Philippines-based creators. But Tim Joslyn, chief technology officer at Paymentology, argued in a CoinDesk opinion piece Saturday (June 6) that this was “not a complete payments experience” but “a faster way to move
